title: Sentiment Analysis
subtitle: Bidirectional LSTM · IMDB-trained
description: Type or paste any English text. The recurrent network scores it from negative (0) to positive (1).

fields.name: text
fields.label: Text to analyse
fields.hint: Movie review, product review, tweet, anything…
fields.default: I absolutely loved every minute of this. The story was gripping and the performances were unforgettable.
